articles.title: Another 3 members of Iran's women's soccer team decide against staying in Australia as refugees - PBS
articles.description: Another three members of the Iran's women’s soccer team who accepted refugee visas to stay in Australia have decided to return to their homeland, an Australian government minister said on Sunday.
